---
title: "Amilcar Campos"
image: images/profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/amilcar-campos/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/AmiCM/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto::contact@amicampos.com
---

## About this blog

This is a personal blog about diverse topics, mainly: Technology, Investing, Cloud, AI, etc.
